objectives.statement: Describe the recommended Premed subject journey and explain at least two ways one stage prepares the next.
Explain why representative concepts from the Premed subjects matter for later medical study.
Identify the scientific knowledge and concrete capabilities learners should be able to use by course completion.

scenes.title: How the subjects prepare you for what follows
The destination and your first check
